[Southern Baltic] POLISH NAV WARN 081/26
270600 UTC APR
POLISH NAV WARN 081/26
SOUTHERN BALTIC. POLISH COAST
DUE TO MILITARY EXERCISES ZONE S-6
IS CLOSED FOR SHIPPING AND FISHERY:
CENTERED 54-39.27N 016-36.59E
27 TO 29 APR  06:00-21:59 UTC
30 APR  06:00-12:00 AND 17:00-21:59 UTC
CANCEL THIS MSG 302159 UTC APR
